members.name: Dr. Saji V.R.
members.bio: Head of Computer Science & Engineering department, supporting student innovations, research and technical growth across all semesters.

members.name: Rahul R.
members.bio: Full Stack Developer, passionate about building community tools, hosting hackathons, and mentoring juniors in React & Node.

members.name: Anjana Sen
members.bio: UI/UX enthusiast and competitive programmer. Leads workshop schedules, public relations, and club administrative tasks.

members.name: Abhijit Nair
members.bio: Linux power user and backend architect. Specializes in Node.js, systems programming, and competitive coding strategies.

events.title: Introduction to Open Source
events.description: Kickstart your open source journey! Learn git fundamentals, branching strategy, and pull request mechanics while contributing to collaborative community repositories.

events.title: SBCE Hackfest 2026
events.description: A thrilling 24-hour hackathon where student developers collaborate in teams to build innovative, solid-color designed solutions addressing modern campus problems.

settings.heroSubtext: Sree Buddha College of Engineering, Pattoor
settings.heroTagline: Empowering the next generation of developers and software architects through collaborative hacking, hands-on bootcamps, and engineering excellence.
settings.aboutHistory: Established in 2021 by the Department of Computer Science & Engineering, the SBCE Coding Club has grown into the campus hub for technological leadership. We connect aspiring programmers, open-source advocates, and problem solvers to learn together, build for the community, and prepare for premium tech careers.
settings.aboutMission: To nurture a robust and inclusive developer ecosystem on campus where students learn modern engineering practices by doing.
settings.aboutVision: To produce top-tier technical talent capable of engineering solutions for national and global challenges, setting a benchmark for student-run technical communities in Kerala.
aboutObjectives: Conduct weekly code-along labs and specialized bootcamps on industry-relevant frameworks.
Foster active open-source contributions on GitHub and participation in global hackathons.
Deliver rigorous peer mentorship for technical interviews, DSA, and competitive coding.
Design and deploy open-source utility systems to solve immediate needs of the college community.

socialLinks.location: Sree Buddha College of Engineering, Pattoor, Nooranad, Alappuzha, Kerala - 690529

settings.footerText: © 2026 CSE SBCE Coding Club. Engineered for developers, by developers.
